rows.finalText: The cards answer "What is the next right step in my calling" through Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. The sequence begins in Past with Birds (12), so communication quality shapes immediate outcomes is already in play. In your calling, Birds often looks like nerves, chatter, quick exchanges, and the mental weather created by constant conversation. Mice (23) in Present acts as the fulcrum, putting small drains can undermine major goals where the sequence can turn. Mice colors your calling through stress, erosion, and the small repeated drains that become serious only after they have accumulated. The likely direction shows in Future through Bear (15), and it suggests strength can protect if paired with fairness once the pivot is met directly. Bear colors your calling through strength can protect if paired with fairness, with power, resources, and protection close to the surface. Birds (12) with Bear (15) show what most shapes the question of calling: a blend of dialogue and power, asking you to favor concise, clarifying dialogue while staying alert to control struggles or scarcity fear. The spread turns on Mice (23) more than any other card. Here Mice becomes concrete through stress, erosion, and the small repeated drains that become serious only after they have accumulated. Birds (12) with Bear (15) keep emphasizing a blend of dialogue and power, asking you to favor concise, clarifying dialogue while staying alert to control struggles or scarcity fear. Patch leaks and simplify so Bear (15) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
